| [4](BBE.md#v4) | He had six sons in Hebron; he was ruling there for seven years and six months, and in Jerusalem for thirty-three years. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
